description_long: This object consists of a single, slender green stem emerging vertically from a flat, rectangular base. The base is decorated with a colorful, geometric folk pattern in shades of orange, yellow, and black on a white background, resembling traditional textile designs. The stem appears to be anchored in a small mound of material at the center of the base, possibly simulating soil or clay. No visible petals or flower head are present at the top of the stem, and there are no discernible leaves attached to the stem. The overall appearance suggests a minimalist or stylized representation of a flower, with the focus on the stem and decorative base. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for display on a table or as a small urban decorative element.
description: A slender green stem rises from a rectangular base adorned with a colorful folk textile pattern. The object is minimalistic, with no visible petals or leaves.
description_view_0: The stem is seen emerging from the center of the patterned base, with the geometric design clearly visible and the base slightly warped at the edges.
description_view_1: The stem appears more upright, and the folk pattern on the base is fully visible, showing the symmetry of the design.
description_view_2: The stem is viewed from an angle, highlighting the thickness of the base and the anchoring mound around the stem.
description_view_3: The stem is seen from the opposite side, with the patterned base and anchoring mound visible, and the stem leaning slightly.
attribute_petal_arrangement: No petals are visible; the flower head is absent or not represented.
